title: Add investigator output schema variant and report-result plumbing
description: Implement investigator-specific structured output handling in runner/model plumbing so investigator beads require findings, recommendations, risk areas, and report path while omitting mutation/review-only fields.
acceptance_criteria: Runner schema accepts `agent_type: investigator` and validates the investigator-specific required fields.
Investigator results do not require or expose `verdict`, `changed_files`, or `next_agent` in the investigator schema path.
Model and prompt-side structured output plumbing can carry investigator report metadata without breaking existing worker flows.
Schema tests cover valid investigator payloads and reject missing required investigation fields.
